observations.polarity: Dan rejects material abundance in favor of spiritual meaning
observations.summary: Dan expresses a tension between the abundance of material things and the futility of devoting life to them since they cannot be carried into death, highlighting a conflict between material accumulation and spiritual or existential purpose.

left_evidence.quote: "Abundance of things?" Dan spat, his voice cracking with brine.

right_evidence.quote: "Why devote my life to things I cannot carry into death?"
